title: Better Sleep
body:
[![Better Sleep Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07c597e930c310272261d870770ee4c51bee5215.png)]()

Better Sleep is a datapack designed to enhance the sleeping mechanics in Minecraft, providing a more customizable and immersive experience for multiplayer servers.

## Features:
- **Sleep Notifications**: Players are notified as soon as can sleep, with messages tailored to weather conditions (clear, rainy, or thundering nights).
- **No Sleep Status**: Players can set a "No Sleep" status to communicate to others they dont want the night to be skipped.
- **Visual  Time Control**: When sleeping the time now visually skips forward, leading to a more immersive experience.

## Commands:
- **/function better_sleep:config**: Acces the configuration menu for adjusting settings and controlling the datapack.
- **/trigger better_sleep.no_sleep**: Toggle No Sleep status.
- **/trigger better_sleep.sleep_notifier**: Toggle Sleep Notifier

---
